  • Method Details

    • getSprints

      @GetMapping("/projects/{projectId}/sprints") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<SprintResponse>> getSprints(@PathVariable Long projectId)

    • createSprint

      @PostMapping("/projects/{projectId}/sprints") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SprintResponse> createSprint(@PathVariable Long projectId, @Valid @RequestBody @Valid CreateSprintRequest request)

    • startSprint

      @PatchMapping("/sprints/{sprintId}/start") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SprintResponse> startSprint(@PathVariable Long sprintId)

    • completeSprint

      @PatchMapping("/sprints/{sprintId}/complete") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SprintResponse> completeSprint(@PathVariable Long sprintId)

    • addIssueToSprint

      @PostMapping("/sprints/{sprintId}/issues") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,String>> addIssueToSprint(@PathVariable Long sprintId, @RequestBody Map<String,Long> body)

    • getBoard

      @GetMapping("/projects/{projectId}/board") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<Issue.IssueStatus,List<IssueResponse>>> getBoard(@PathVariable Long projectId)
